patterns.pos_dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6 h-screen overflow-hidden bg-[#F9F8F6] p-4
patterns.pos_sidebar: md:col-span-2 flex flex-col gap-4 overflow-y-auto h-full
patterns.pos_main_grid: md:col-span-7 grid grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-4 overflow-y-auto h-full content-start
patterns.pos_ticket: md:col-span-3 bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-[#E5E0D8] flex flex-col h-full overflow-hidden
patterns.kds_board: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6 h-full p-6
patterns.kds_column: flex flex-col gap-4 bg-white/50 rounded-2xl p-4 border border-[#E5E0D8]

surfaces.card: bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-[#E5E0D8] transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-md
surfaces.touch_target: min-h-[64px] min-w-[64px] rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center p-4

button.base: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-xl font-semibold transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50

input.base: flex h-12 w-full rounded-xl border-2 border-[#E5E0D8] bg-white px-4 py-2 text-base ring-offset-white file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-[#8A8A8A] focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:border-[#D45D3C] disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

product_card.style: bg-white rounded-2xl p-4 flex flex-col gap-3 items-center text-center cursor-pointer border-2 border-[#E5E0D8] hover:border-[#D45D3C] transition-all active:scale-95 shadow-sm

ticket_item.style: flex items-start justify-between p-3 border-b border-[#E5E0D8] gap-4
ticket_item.qty_badge: bg-[#F3E8E0] text-[#2C2C2C] font-bold rounded-lg min-w-[32px] h-[32px] flex items-center justify-center

images.usage: Top left of sidebar, login screen
Product thumbnail for sides and combos

icons.usage: Use thick, legible icons. Stroke width 2 or 2.5.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over primary buttons is pure white (#FFFFFF)
accessibility.touch_targets: All interactive elements on POS screens MUST be at least 48x48px, preferably 64x64px.

instructions_to_main_agent: Prioritize touch-friendly UI. Use large buttons and generous spacing for the POS and KDS screens.
Do not use generic blue themes. Stick strictly to the warm Organic & Earthy palette (Terracotta, Sand, Wood tones).
Use 'Work Sans' for clear, legible headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for precise data tables and lists.
For the KDS (Kitchen Display System), use the defined 'kds_status' colors to distinctly highlight pending, preparing, and ready tickets.
The POS Order Screen should follow a 3-column mental model: Categories (Left), Products (Center, takes most space), Order Ticket (Right).
Always use the provided media URLs for product thumbnails to ensure a high-quality, cohesive look. Do not use generic placeholders.
Include 'data-testid' attributes on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tickets) for automated testing.
Ensure WebSockets state updates trigger subtle UI animations (like a flash or highlight) so users notice real-time changes.
